blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,902 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
